race.comment: STRAWBERRY SWING (5) dug deep to score here two back, then went close to making two on the bounce last start in this grade at Clare. Gets in well with the claim and is drawn favourably. Looks the one to beat. SPIRITUAL GAL (6) was nabbed on the line last start by STRAWBERRY SWING. Gets weight off but still meets the winner worse because of the apprentice going on. Tough ask to turn the tables but will push forward and give herself every chance to do so. PRESCIENT (2) got things back on track last time at Clare when battling on gamely into second after leading them up. Peak fitness now and has enough dash to offset the wide alley. SETTEVELI (1) resumes from a short break and has won fresh before. Murtaghs booking signals stable confidence, so worth keeping in mind.
